title: Early April 2026 Status Note
description: A short early April update on Kreativ WP priorities, including plugin submission prep and the next release target.
metaDescription: A short early April update on Kreativ WP priorities, including plugin submission prep and the next release target.
intro: Work slowed down for a bit, but Internal Links Audit remains the active next release and plugin submission prep is back in focus.

items.title: Work paused briefly
items.body: Progress slowed down for a short stretch while attention moved to other work. This is a pause in momentum, not a roadmap reset.

items.title: Submission prep is back in focus
items.body: The immediate goal now is to review plugin state, prepare WordPress.org submission materials, and get back into a reliable release rhythm.

items.title: Next public target remains unchanged
items.body: Kreativ Internal Links Audit is still positioned as the next release target, with Smart Related Posts following after that work stabilizes.
